title: RBTW
description: Provides helpful features for the RBTW Game on DiamondFire
body:
This mod provides features and quality of life improvements for the RBTW Game on [DiamondFire](https://mcdiamondfire.com).  
For more information about the Game, visit [zBin Games Discord](https://discord.gg/NQqvzNXXpd)

-------------
### User Interface
-------------
- **Scoreboard Hider**: Why do you need it anyway
- **Custom Overlays**: Keeps track about various things in the game and displays them nicely 
- **Layer Display**: Shows your current position in the layers
- **Loot Calculator**: Automatically calculates your inventory value depending on the content
- **Multiplier Display**: Displays a list of every current money multiplier you have unlocked

-------------
### Highlighters
-------------
- **Loot in Range**: Draws a box around loot within your interaction range
- **Villagers in Range**: Outlines villagers with a color depending if they are visible (dark tint) or within interation range (bright) 

## Support
Join the [zBin Games Discord](https://discord.gg/NQqvzNXXpd) and ping **@sakurasou** for any questions or help.
